title: English Class 英语课
scene: 英语课上，老师带同学们练习英语对话。

lines.en: Good morning, class! Today we're going to practice dialogues.
lines.zh: 早上好，同学们！今天我们要练习对话。

lines.en: Anna and Tom, can you come to the front, please?
lines.zh: 安娜和汤姆，你们能到前面来吗？

lines.en: Anna, you are a shop assistant. Tom, you are a customer.
lines.zh: 安娜，你是店员。汤姆，你是顾客。

lines.en: Hello, I'd like to buy a notebook, please.
lines.zh: 你好，我想买一个笔记本。

lines.en: Sure! What color would you like?
lines.zh: 当然可以！你想要什么颜色的？

lines.en: Blue, please. How much is it?
It's five yuan. Here you go.
Excellent! You both did a wonderful job! Class, let's give them a hand!
lines.zh: 太棒了！你们都做得很好！同学们，让我们给他们鼓掌！
